threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~1.3s of lockdown): Crunch Right Crunch (knockup 1.25s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Zinx. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
Enemy is 4/5 physical — a single armor item blunts most of their damage; itemize armor on anyone diveable.
Dive threat on your backline: Crunch. Assign peel for your carry and ward your flanks.
synergy: Little hard CC on your side — you can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
ourKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
ourKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
ourKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
ourKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

ourKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
ourKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
ourKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
ourKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

ourKits.combo: Lash Kick gap-close+slow → Windburn %hp basics → Backlash push, Quelling Gale to disengage
ourKits.passive: Rising Storm stacks grant attack speed
ourKits.playWith: a team that lets her side-lane and pick
ourKits.playAgainst: she wants 1v1s — group and burst her; Quelling Gale only stops projectiles

ourKits.combo: Phantom Rush → Subjugate root → Siphon → Colossal Blow
ourKits.winCondition: stack Souls to snowball Siphon and lock down with the root
ourKits.passive: ability kills grant permanent Soul stacks (HP + damage)
ourKits.playWith: a team that converts his root into kills
ourKits.playAgainst: deny his last-hits early to starve Souls; dodge the slow Subjugate

enemyKits.combo: Detection Protocol track → Chrono Swipe → Primeval Roar shield → Ursine Burst grab ult
enemyKits.winCondition: grab a key target out of position and burst them down
enemyKits.playWith: a team that collapses on his grabbed target
enemyKits.playAgainst: his grab ult is the whole threat — bait it / stay spaced; CC during Primeval Roar

enemyKits.combo: Peekaboo! mark+slow → Knock, Knock! sniper → Back It Up! displacement ult
enemyKits.winCondition: land long-range snipes on marked targets and reset on takedowns
enemyKits.playWith: engage that holds a target in his sniper line
enemyKits.playAgainst: close the gap — he's weak point-blank; dodge the skillshot snipe

enemyKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
enemyKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
enemyKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
enemyKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

enemyKits.combo: Forward Crunch gap-close stun → Right Crunch knockup → empowered Left Crunch, sustain via Re-Crunch
enemyKits.winCondition: all-in a squishy with the empowered combo and heal back through Re-Crunch
enemyKits.passive: post-ability empowered basic that refunds cooldowns
enemyKits.playWith: peel-stripping engage so he reaches the backline
enemyKits.playAgainst: peel/CC him off — without resets he's stranded; anti-heal blunts Re-Crunch

enemyKits.combo: stance-swap with Zero Shift → Tachyon Lance (ranged) or melee chain → Limit Break on Overheat
enemyKits.winCondition: build Heat and burst with Limit Break, flexing range and melee
enemyKits.passive: damage builds Heat → Overheat unlocks Limit Break
enemyKits.playWith: peel that lets her ramp Heat safely
enemyKits.playAgainst: pressure her before Overheat; CC during the melee stance

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
